valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Sat 27 Jun 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Sun 28 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low Rockall 999 moving north and losing its identity. New low expected 100 miles northwest of Rockall 987 by 0600 tomorrow
